description: As the healthcare informatics analyst for Memorial General Hospital, process the Q3 Emergency Department visit logs from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/ed_visit_logs_q3.csv to build an ED Operations Dashboard saved as ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/ed_operations_dashboard.xlsx. The dashboard must include patient-level calculations for 'Door-to-Doctor Time' (MD_Seen_Time - Arrival_Time) and 'Total LOS' (Departure_Time - Arrival_Time) in minutes, ensuring cross-midnight calculations are handled correctly. Include a status column flagging visits where Total LOS exceeds the 240-minute target as 'Breach' versus 'Compliant'. On a separate summary sheet, provide the overall average Door-to-Doctor time, the overall LWBS rate (percentage of visits where Disposition is 'LWBS'), and a summary table showing the average or median Total LOS grouped by Acuity_ESI level (1-5). Format the final dashboard for executive review.
